{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122463849421D0C2E844578AC07"}"},"total":57},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7504352900057482046","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"描写细腻，对环境的把握以及人物感情的刻画都恰到好处，可见作者有很深的文字功底，就目前所读到的内容可以让人有一种很深的代入感，如此清晰而细腻的文笔让一座在赛博朋克世界观下破败荒芜城市跃然于纸上，通过简单的与主要角色互动，不经意间，姗姗几笔就将在这个城市中生活的人的形象生动展示出来，文字之间带出那种活着的气息，主要角色刻画的简洁而有力，通过深刻的心理活动描写，让人完全带入了主角的经历，至少目前内容让我很是期待后续发展，加油啊(ง•̀_•́)ง作者菌","text_exts":[{"e":80,"s":76,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741043984578AC07%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227504352900057482046%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227494103497550335001%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1747252883,"group_id":"7494103497550335001","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5hhWKRAemzZLri6oWGYXWJcPmfhkbWQmrlc4UVgOx1z","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4264361993187747","user_name":"爱吃泡菜的息兮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4264361993187747","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7494103497550335001","book_info":{"abstract":"【本书正常完本，可放心阅读】
里昂·雷诺，作为义体医生技术超群，诊所开在距夜之城两百多公里的凤凰城，48岁时因为妻女去世而酗酒堕落，谋划着自杀。
露西娜·栉名，曾经的荒坂黑客，从欧洲漂洋过海来到新美国，12岁时流落凤凰城昏倒于街头，被清道夫捡起送至里昂诊所的门前。
2068年，两人的世界开始纠缠，里昂的灰暗生活被彻底打乱。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o43602a30ec1f3a80c6507581a807e219~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"啊电饭煲","author_id":"","book_id":"7494103497550335001","book_name":"赛博朋克：末路曙光","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#101010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7494103594119987737","read_count":"267","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"375443"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.7","serial_count":"162","tags":"科幻末世,穿越","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o43602a30ec1f3a80c6507581a807e219~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779288398&x-signature=ivdvPe2AuBB1660kmVodVmJXuDo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"521617321247500","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"40"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032122463849421D0C2E844578AC07"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3821,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":3082},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1747266566,"author_reply_time":1747266584,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7538862213516657432","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"真正展示了赛博朋克对人性的异化，比大部分披着赛博朋克外衣的科幻爽文精彩多了，夜之城没有活着的传奇，注定了这个世界不会出现完美的结局，但是在绝望之中绽放的人性的曙光也更加今人动容，就是关于露娜妈妈的剧情有点草率了，总体还是非常不错的","text_exts":[{"e":9,"s":5,"text":"赛博朋克","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741043984578AC07%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227538862213516657432%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227494103497550335001%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%B5%9B%E5%8D%9A%E6%9C%8B%E5%85%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":41,"s":38,"text":"夜之城","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%9C%E4%B9%8B%E5%9F%8E&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741043984578AC07%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227538862213516657432%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227494103497550335001%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%9C%E4%B9%8B%E5%9F%8E%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1755284334,"group_id":"7494103497550335001","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N23pwi3Zd95VMyMcPbfKAdot9SEMxk6KM7UZ2oXN5KH5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"3439696336659012","user_name":"爱吃槐花粉的魂无极"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3439696336659012","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7494103497550335001","book_in
